commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `WasMentioned` handling to source reply delivery resolution so mentioned group/channel turns switch from `message_tool_only` to `automatic`, with resolver and visibility-policy unit tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main resolves mentioned group/channel turns to `message_tool_only`, Discord coverage locks that behavior for `effectiveWasMentioned: true`, and dispatch skips normal final replies when delivery is suppressed. I did not run a live channel reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer policy/security review plus contributor real behavior proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane until the shared-room @mention rule is decided.

target.title: fix: deliver group/channel replies automatically when bot is @mentioned
